svg.text: One row per distinct experiment cell — a combination of organism, value, judge, alternative, and answer source.
Rows are grouped by family; chip colors match the experiment-kit slots. One column changed at a time.
Run bar: one block per run — block width = the rounds in that run (4 or 8); label spells out the rounds per run, e.g. “6 × 4 + 2 × 8 rounds”.
both models · both values (shown per row below)
74 runs · 340 selection rounds · 22 experiment cells · 5 families · one column changed at a time
two forward-test experiments sit outside this corpus
